name: RC Monster Truck VR - Simulator Game

reviews.review_description:
I fired up this RC truck sim today hoping for some high-octane, miniature vehicle action. What I got instead was ten minutes of profound boredom before I uninstalled it with extreme prejudice.
The "gameplay" (and I use that term loosely) consists solely of driving an RC truck around an empty swimming pool. By yourself. There are no missions, no other vehicles, no challenges, no customization, no progression, and absolutely no discernible point. It's literally just driving in circles in a barren, chlorinated void.
I was bored within minutes. There's nothing to do, nowhere to go, and no reason to keep playing. If you're looking for an engaging RC truck simulation, or really any kind of engaging game at all, look elsewhere. This one is less a game and more an empty digital sandbox with only one toy. Save yourself the download time and the inevitable frustration.
